calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-05-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by plaintiff's counsel; appearance by defendant's counsel. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to July 23, 2024 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

NOTE: After hearing, plaintiff filed a dismissal. Sanction order is vacated. The OSC is off calendar. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-04-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendants Financial Information; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of George G. Benetatos; [Proposed] Order [Ccp Section 3295(C)]
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF KHAN BUSHRA's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Defendants Financial Information.

Appearances (via Zoom):

GEORGE G. BENETATOS, Esq., Law Office of, (415) 203-2296, for Plaintiff.

KRISTOPHER D.R. DOODHA Esq., of CLAPP, MORONEY, VUCINICH, BEEMAN and SCHELEY, (650) 989-5400, for Defendant.

Plaintiff and Defendant stipulate to the matter being decided by the judge pro tem. The Judge Pro Tem and both parties (all appearing remotely) authorize the Clerk to sign the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The matter is argued. Upon conclusion of argument, the matter is taken under submission. Counsel for Plaintiff is to prepare and submit an order to the judge pro tem via email to gerilynngreen@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Geri Green. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported (302/JPT)
